title: Rename 'Assis Tech' to 'Assis Technician' and update PDF layout to mirror app theme

requirements.summary: Update all visible labels in ReportForm.tsx to display 'Assis Technician' instead of 'Assis Tech'
acceptanceCriteria: The personnel input field label reads 'Assis Technician' (not 'Assis Tech' or 'Helper')
The placeholder text for that input reads 'Assis Technician' or similar
Any section heading that previously displayed 'ASSIS TECH' now displays 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN'
No remaining instances of 'Assis Tech' or 'ASSIS TECH' appear in the form UI

file_operations.description: Replace all visible text content that currently displays 'Assis Tech' or 'ASSIS TECH' with 'Assis Technician' or 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN' respectively. Update labels, placeholders, and aria-labels for the assistTech input field and its section heading. The ReportData interface property name 'assistTech' remains unchanged; only UI-visible text is updated.

requirements.summary: Update PDF output to display 'Assis Technician:' label instead of 'Assis Tech:'
acceptanceCriteria: The generated PDF report displays 'Assis Technician:' as the label for this field
No instance of 'Assis Tech:' or 'Helper:' appears in the PDF output
The ReportData interface 'assistTech' property name is unchanged

file_operations.description: In the generateReportPDF function, locate where the assistTech field label is rendered in the PDF and change the display text from 'Assis Tech:' to 'Assis Technician:'. Do not modify the ReportData interface property name or any property references in code.

requirements.summary: Update PDF layout to mirror the app's industrial dark-theme aesthetic in typography, spacing, and structure without changing colors
acceptanceCriteria: PDF section headings use bold, uppercase, wider-tracked typography consistent with the app's heading style
Horizontal divider lines appear between PDF sections, mirroring the app's card/section dividers
Field label-value pairs are consistently spaced and clearly separated throughout the PDF
The PDF header displays 'SECURITY ENGINEERING INC.' in large bold type and 'Daily Field Report' as a smaller subtitle
Padding/margins around sections in the PDF reflect the structured card-like layout of the app
No color values in the PDF output are changed from their current state

file_operations.description: Refactor the PDF layout in generateReportPDF to mirror the app's industrial aesthetic: (1) Update section headings to use bold, uppercase, wide letter-spacing (tracking) typography matching Oswald/bold heading style from the app; (2) Add horizontal divider lines between major sections to match the app's section dividers; (3) Restructure field label-value pairs into a consistent two-column or clearly separated format with uniform line spacing; (4) Increase whitespace and padding around section blocks to mirror the app's card-based layout; (5) Ensure the PDF header displays 'SECURITY ENGINEERING INC.' in large bold type with 'Daily Field Report' as a smaller subtitle below, matching the app header hierarchy. Do not alter any existing color values in the PDF output.
